name: PEOPLES BANCORP INC
business: Peoples makes available a complete line of commercial and consumer banking, trust and investment, insurance, premium financing solutions, equipment leases and equipment financing agreements through its financial subsidiaries Peoples Bank, Peoples Insurance and Vantage. The company primarily serves customers in Ohio, Kentucky, West Virginia, Virginia, Washington, D.C. and Maryland, with nationwide offerings for premium finance and equipment leasing.
sellsTo: nationwide customers for premium finance and equipment leasing

exposures.sentence: Peoples makes available a complete line of commercial and consumer banking, trust and investment, insurance, premium financing solutions, equipment leases and equipment financing agreements through its financial subsidiaries Peoples Bank, Peoples Insurance and Vantage.
This could include the development, implementation, and adaptation of digital or cryptocurrency, blockchain, and other fintech technology.

While to date, Peoples has not detected a significant compromise, significant data loss or any material financial losses related to cybersecurity attacks, Peoples systems and those of its customers and third-party service providers are under constant threat and it is possible that Peoples could experience a significant event in the future.
The financial services industry is continually undergoing rapid technological change with frequent introductions of new technology-driven products and services, including artificial intelligence.
